concerns.text: FR-006 requires the system to 'suppress independent coefficient interpretation' and 'frame the relationship descriptively' for collinear pairs. Task T023 only implements detection and JSON report generation. No task exists to update the baseline model's output or final report to enforce this descriptive framing constraint, leaving the requirement unimplemented.

FR-008 mandates a 'confounder sensitivity analysis' by adding proxy variables and reporting the R² change. Task T033 only implements the logic to log 'No proxy variables available' if missing. There is no task to actually perform the model refit with proxies or calculate/report the R² delta when proxies are present.

SC-001 requires measuring statistical significance (p < 0.05) of the R² improvement via a 'permutation test'. No task in Phase 5 (T030-T036) describes implementing or running a permutation test. T035 mentions 'significance p-values' but provides no source for their calculation, leaving the success criterion unmeasurable.

SC-002 requires a sensitivity analysis measuring the stability of the 'top-5 significant interaction terms' across a threshold sweep. Task T032 only mentions 'reporting variation in significant terms' without explicitly defining the logic to identify the top-5 terms and calculate the percentage stability metric required by the success criterion.

FR-004 explicitly requires a fallback to 'single-pass training' with default parameters (n_estimators=100, max_depth=10) if the grid search exceeds 4 hours. Task T031 implements a 'hard timeout enforcement' with fallback to 'default params' but does not explicitly specify the required parameter values in the task description, creating a risk of non-compliance with the specific fallback requirement.
